properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v6 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Savior, Redeemer Lifted me from the miry clay

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Almighty forever I will never be the same'cause You came near

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From the everlasting To the world we live The Father's only Son

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You lived and You died You rose again on high You opened the way For the world to live again Hallelujah For all You've done

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You lived and You died You rose again on high You opened the way For the world to live again Hallelujah For all You've done Hallelujah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: 'Cause You came near From the everlasting To the world we live The Father's only Son
